ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays (e.g., 1B, C, P) */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in feet and inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "bats" TEXT /* Batting side of the player (e.g., Right, Left) */,
  "throws" TEXT /* Throwing arm of the player (e.g., Right, Left) */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of professional experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stat entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total games played by the player during the season */,
  "games_started" INTEGER /* Total games started by the player */,
  "total_chances" INTEGER /* Total chances taken by the player */,
  "errors" INTEGER /* Number of errors committed */,
  "put_outs" INTEGER /* Number of put outs made */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made */,
  "passed_balls" INTEGER /* Number of passed balls */,
  "pickoff" INTEGER /* Number of pickoff attempts */,
  "stolen_base_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of stolen base attempts */,
  "caught_stealing" INTEGER /* Number of caught stealing */,
  "fielding_percentage" REAL /* Fielding percentage of the player */,
  "batting_average" REAL /* Batting average of the player */,
  "at_bats" INTEGER /* Number of times the player has been at bat */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored by the player */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits by the player */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Number of home runs hit by the player */,
  "runs_batted_in" INTEGER /* Number of runs batted in by the player */,
  "stolen_bases" INTEGER /* Number of stolen bases by the player */,
  "on_base_percentage" REAL /* On-base percentage of the player */,
  "slugging_percentage" REAL /* Slugging percentage of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team competes in */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team is part of */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is located */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the team plays */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game (Home/Away) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the game in hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_team" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "signed_date" TEXT /* Date the player signed with the team */,
  "contract_length" INTEGER /* Length of the contract in years */,
  "salary" REAL /* Annual salary of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the coach (e.g., Head Coach, Assistant Coach) */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the coach */,
  "achievements" TEXT /* Notable achievements of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., fielding, batting) */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations based on the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_coaches" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach */,
  "coach_role" TEXT /* Role of the coach in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_players" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "played_position" TEXT /* Position played by the player in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "player_id")
)
